conditions_for_revisiting: Real B200 kernel measurements become available and differ materially from the emulator-based ground truth.
New FA4 configurations or launch parameters fall outside the synthetic matrix and violate the predictor's structural assumptions.
A downstream writing or review stage identifies a claim that requires additional ablation or robustness evidence.
sections.reason: The combined predictor met every success criterion on held-out validation (MAPE 4.50%, 100% within 30% error, 100% bottleneck-label accuracy, +17.7pp vs baseline). The ablation structure shows the TMA/L2 bandwidth correction is the dominant improvement, while occupancy and precision terms provide a measurable additional reduction in error and max APE. The emulator caveat is documented and does not block finalization.

summary: The analysis stage confirms the combined FA4 B200 white-box predictor is supported and the empirical pass can be finalized.
title: Analysis Route Decision: Finalize Empirical Pass
